title: Enable Emails & Activities widget for Service boards in iOS app
excerpt:
Description
Make the Emails & Activities widget available in the Monday iOS mobile app for Service board users, not just CRM users. Service agents can currently view tickets in the mobile app but cannot see email threads…

posts.author: dpg-emilyw (Emily Watts)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Make the Emails & Activities widget available in the Monday iOS mobile app for Service board users, not just CRM users. Service agents can currently view tickets in the mobile app but cannot see email threads or respond because this widget is restricted to CRM boards only. Since both products use the same iOS app, this functionality should be available to both.

What are you trying to achieve

Our customer service agents need to respond to support tickets while mobile. Currently, they can see tickets in the iOS app but cannot view email history or send responses. This forces them to wait until they’re at a desktop to respond (delaying customer support), makeing the iOS app essentially useless for Service agents.

Since the Emails & Activities widget already exists in the iOS app for CRM users, extending it to Service users would enable mobile ticket management without any new development—just removing an artificial product-line restriction.

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
100% agree with this.

If Service agents can access tickets on mobile but can’t see or respond to emails, it kind of defeats the purpose of having the app in the first place.

Since the Emails & Activities widget already exists in iOS for CRM, this feels more like a limitation than a technical gap. Extending it to Service boards would make mobile actually usable for support teams and remove a lot of unnecessary delays.

This would be a big quality of life improvement for anyone managing tickets on the go.
